settings.heading: Warranty
settings.subtitle: Genuine products with a real local warranty — not a grey-market import.

settings.heading: Warranty terms & claims
settings.content:
Every product we sell is 100% genuine and covered by a local warranty. Coverage length varies by product and brand, and is shown on the product page and your invoice.

The warranty covers manufacturing defects under normal use. It does not cover accidental damage, misuse, or normal wear.

To make a claim: keep your order number and proof of purchase, then contact our team. We handle claims locally through our Doha showroom — no shipping items overseas.
